name: The Debris Field
description: A slowly tumbling mass of grey hull plating, olive-drab cargo containers, and twisted structural steel, spread across a pocket of void. The pieces rotate in silence, catching dull metallic light. The wreckage of a great vessel — shattered, scattered, and cold.
aspect: A Dead Ship Still Full of Secrets

rooms.name: Edge of the Debris Field
rooms.description: Jagged shards of grey hull plating drift lazily against the black void, spinning slow enough to catch dull reflections of distant light. The largest pieces — bent girders, crumpled bulkheads — hum faintly, as if the wreckage still remembers being whole. A clear path back to the skerry lies to the south.
aspects: Everything Drifts If You Let Go

rooms.name: Shattered Cargo Bay
rooms.description: The remnants of a cargo hold, its outer walls peeled back like a tin can to expose rust-brown internal plating. Crates of dull green and grey bob gently in the void, some still sealed with corroded latches. Emergency strip-lighting along the ceiling flickers orange in places, casting long shadows between the floating containers.

rooms.name: Gaping Hull Breach
rooms.description: A massive hole torn through the outer hull, its ragged edges dark with corrosion. Layers of internal structure are exposed — insulation foam, conduit bundles, structural ribs — like looking into the cross-section of a body. Sparks flash intermittently from deeper in the wreckage, throwing harsh white light across the twisted metal.

rooms.name: Ruined Control Room
rooms.description: A cramped room ringed with dead consoles, their dark screens cracked and frosted with corrosion. A single emergency light overhead bathes everything in dull amber. Someone has cleared a workspace near the listing captain's chair — tools laid out in precise rows on a sheet of fabric, oil rags folded neatly beside them.

rooms.name: Engine Room Wreckage
rooms.description: A cavernous space dominated by massive turbines split open like cracked eggs, their dark cores exposed. Oil has pooled and frozen in black sheets across the deck. Among the wreckage, a cylindrical device the size of a person pulses with faint blue-white light — the Stabilization Engine, still drawing power from something.

enemies_data.name: Rat Swarm
enemies_data.description: A chittering mass of pale, eyeless rats with translucent skin stretched tight over visible bones. They pour from cracks in the bulkhead like liquid, each one small but the whole swarm a gnawing tide.

enemies_data.name: Hound of Annwn
enemies_data.description: A spectral hound with white fur and red-tipped ears, its form flickering between solid and translucent. It watches you with ancient, knowing eyes, and its growl resonates in your chest.
aspects: Between This World and the Next

enemies_data.name: Corroded Automaton
enemies_data.description: A maintenance robot gone wrong. Its corroded frame jerks with erratic, dangerous movements. Sparks fly from exposed wiring.
aspects: Doesn't Know What It's Doing Anymore
One Spark From a Short Circuit
